D113 neutral helper for strict canonical JSON UTF-8 bytes.

## Import

```ts

```

## Signature

```ts
function strictCanonicalJsonBytes(value: unknown): Uint8Array
```

## Parameters

|---|---|---|
| `value` | `unknown` | Unknown value to check or decode. |

## Returns
